narrative:
Precinct Piqua 1-B/D (precinct in Miami County) has 759 registered voters, with 73.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
